name: medical-r-plot-polish
description: Plugin with a skill for optimizing medical R figures across clinical statistics and omics workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Optimize clinical and omics R figures for publication
interface.longDescription: A plugin that adds a skill for choosing packages and refining manuscript-ready medical R figures, including survival, ROC, forest, heatmap, volcano, enrichment, and single-cell plots.
defaultPrompt: Polish this Kaplan-Meier or ROC figure for a medical manuscript.
Choose the right R packages and style for this omics figure.
Make this clinical or single-cell plot look Nature-like or Cell-like.
